title: trifolium israeliticum
intro: Trifolium israeliticum, also known as Israel Clover or Palestine Clover, is a perennial herb belonging to the legume family, Fabaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Trifolium israeliticum include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and alleviate symptoms of menopause and osteoporosis. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support cardiovascular health and alleviate various health conditions.
